case_title: JOHN EMMETT CADY III VS. FRANCISCO MANOLO FUENTES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED DEC-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, FRANCISCO MANOLO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-30-2016 BY JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN EMMETT CADY, III. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,525.43 FILED BY CADY III, JOHN EMMETT AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, FRANCISCO MANOLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CADY III, JOHN EMMETT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CADY III, JOHN EMMETT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUENTES, FRANCISCO MANOLO $8,525.43 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,600.43, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CADY III, JOHN EMMETT AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, FRANCISCO MANOLO
